chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Children

text: 4689 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مِيرَاثُ اَللَّهِ مِنْ عَبْدِهِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ اَلْوَلَدُ اَلصَّالِحُ يَسْتَغْفِرُ لَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4689 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Allah's (swt) inheritance from His (swt) believing servant is a righteous child who seeks forgiveness for him."
